etymology.description: semantic дё· (divide) + phonetic иұ• (shЗҗ, "pig") -> unclear link to original meaning of 'comply'
etymology.interpretation: The character г’ё combines the component дё·, meaning 'divide,' with the phonetic element иұ• (shЗҗ, 'pig'). The role of 'divide' is not clear in this context, as it serves as a semantic placeholder, while 'pig' serves as the phonetic marker.
